children.heading: Director
children.label: 1 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the National Science Foundation.

children.heading: Institution of higher education
children.label: 2 Institution of higher education
children.text: The term “institution of higher education” has the meaning given that term in .section 1001(a) of title 20
